title: T-044 — Force-unlock scanner LP service (Admin only) (WH §6.11)
prompt:
# T-044 — Force-unlock scanner LP service (Admin only) (WH §6.11)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §6.11
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `forceUnlockLp` Admin-only service used by WH-101 force-unlock modal: deletes the LP lock + writes `scanner_lock_force_released` audit row (V-WH-LP-011).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-force-unlock.ts`: function `forceUnlockLp({lp_id, reason_text})`.
2. RBAC: Admin only (server-side enforced).
3. UPDATE license_plates SET locked_by=NULL, locked_at=NULL WHERE id=lp_id.
4. INSERT audit row `scanner_lock_force_released(admin_user_id, target_lp_id, original_holder_id, original_locked_at, reason_text, at)`.
5. Emit outbox `lp.scanner_lock_force_released`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-force-unlock.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-force-unlock.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an Admin force-unlocks an LP locked by another user, when called, then the lock is cleared and an audit row exists referencing both admin and original holder.
2. Given a Manager attempts force-unlock, when called, then RBAC rejects (V-WH-LP-011).
3. Given the LP was not locked, when called, then service is a no-op but still writes an audit row.
4. Given reason_text is empty, when called, then service rejects.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-force-unlock.test.ts` asserting RBAC + audit row + outbox.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-force-unlock`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-Admin (V-WH-LP-011).
- Do not skip the audit row.

## Dependencies
- T-020
